summary: Exxon Mobil (XOM) up 41% over past year vs CVX -10.8% over past month. BP Q1 profits doubled YoY to $3.2B (reported Apr 28). ConocoPhillips (COP) projecting $12B capex for 2026. Phillips 66 (PSX) and Citgo plan to directly buy Venezuelan heavy crude from PDVSA in April, bypassing Chevron and traditional intermediaries. Energy sector weakest S&P 500 sector in April, down ~8%.
